title: Aleuritia violacea
taxonomy: Aleuritia violacea is classified within the family Apocynaceae. This family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. Apocynaceae includes over 5,000 species, ranging from vines and shrubs to trees. The classification of Aleuritia violacea within this family suggests a connection to other plants with similar characteristics and growth habits. Further study is needed to confirm the exact classification and relationships of Aleuritia violacea.
